case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.briefing: Investors are waiting for a plan. Arrange development stages by time.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.card.ALPHA.title: Alpha
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.card.BETA.title: Beta
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.card.IDEA.hint: Formulation of the problem and solution.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.card.IDEA.title: An idea
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.card.MVP.hint: Minimum working version of the product.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.card.MVP.title: MVP
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.card.RELEASE.title: Release
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.dep.01.message: You can't do MVP before ideas.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.dep.02.message: You cannot test Alpha before MVP.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.dep.03.message: You can't show Beta before Alpha.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.dep.04.message: You cannot release a release before Beta.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.feedback.CAUSALITY_: Raw product should not be given to people before internal inspection.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-01.feedback.LOGIC_GAP: You are trying to approve a stage that is not prepared.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-02.briefing: The team wants to “get into the public eye” faster. Make sure the order is logical.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-02.card.BETA.title: Beta
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-02.card.MVP.title: MVP
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-02.card.PROBLEM.hint: First, understand what we are solving.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-02.card.PROBLEM.title: Problem
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-02.card.RELEASE.title: Release
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-02.dep.01.message: You can't build a prototype without a problem.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-02.dep.02.message: MVP is not born out of thin air.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-02.feedback.LOGIC_GAP: The causality of the stages is broken.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.briefing: Security system. Arrange the stages of preparation for release.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.card.BETA.title: Beta
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.card.LOGGING.title: Logging in
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.card.PENTEST.title: Pentest
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.card.RELEASE.title: Release
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.card.THREAT.hint: Determine what we are protecting ourselves from.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.card.THREAT.title: Threat model
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.dep.01.message: Logs without understanding the threats are useless.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.dep.02.message: Pentest without logs is worse than diagnostics.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.dep.03.message: Beta cannot be released before security checks.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.feedback.CAUSALITY_: The public stage comes before verification.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-03.feedback.LOGIC_GAP: A step is missed or is out of place.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-04.briefing: Investor cycle. Arrange the steps so that it doesn't look like a fairy tale.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-04.card.FUNDING.title: Financing
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-04.card.HIRE.title: Eight
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-04.card.MEETING.title: Meeting
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-04.card.MVP.title: MVP
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-04.card.PITCH.title: Pitch
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-04.dep.01.message: First the pitch, then the meeting.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-04.dep.04.message: MVP is made by people, not air.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-05.briefing: Legal cleanliness before public launch. Arrange the stages.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-05.card.BETA.title: Beta
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-05.card.MVP.title: MVP
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-05.card.PRIVACY.title: Confidentiality
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-05.card.RELEASE.title: Release
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-05.card.TERMS.title: Conditions
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-05.dep.01.message: First the product, then the documents.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-05.feedback.CAUSALITY_: It cannot be released to the public without basic legal framework.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-05.feedback.LOGIC_GAP: The order of the documents is out of order.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-06.briefing: Quality control. Correct order saves you from shame.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-06.card.ALPHA.title: Alpha
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-06.card.BETA.title: Beta
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-06.card.MVP.title: MVP
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-06.card.QA.title: QA
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-06.card.RELEASE.title: Release
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-06.feedback.CAUSALITY_: The public stage comes before quality control.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.briefing: Restore the history of secure access to the server. Error in order = security hole.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.card.AUTHN.hint: Authentication: proving that I am me.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.card.AUTHZ.hint: Authorization: the system decides whether I can come here.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.card.IDENT.hint: Identification: I declare who I am.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.card.LOG.hint: Recording a successful login. Traces always remain.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.card.LOG.title: Creating a session and logging it
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.dep.01.message: You cannot authenticate an unknown user: identification (login) first.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.dep.02.message: You cannot check permissions before proving identity: authentication first.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.dep.03.message: A log of a successful login is possible only after checking rights (authorization).
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.feedback.CAUSAL: Causality is broken: first prove your identity, then prove your rights.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.feedback.LOGIC_: You have skipped a stage. The system does not accept magic instead of procedure.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.feedback.OK: Access is completed correctly: identification → authentication → authorization → log.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-01.feedback.ORDER_: Almost. Check that the steps are strictly in sequence.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.briefing: Repeat the secure login timeline, but with a different identity verification factor.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.card.AUTHZ.hint: Authorization: the system decides whether I can come here.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.card.IDENT.hint: Identification: I declare who I am.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.card.LOG.hint: Recording a successful login. Traces always remain.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.card.LOG.title: Creating a session and logging it
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.dep.01.message: You cannot authenticate an unknown user: identification (login) first.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.dep.02.message: You cannot check permissions before proving identity: authentication first.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.dep.03.message: A log of a successful login is possible only after checking rights (authorization).
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.feedback.CAUSAL: Causality is broken: first prove your identity, then prove your rights.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.feedback.LOGIC_: You have skipped a stage. The system does not accept magic instead of procedure.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.feedback.OK: Access is completed correctly: identification → authentication → authorization → log.
case08.fr8b.FR8-B-SEC-02.feedback.ORDER_: Almost. Check that the steps are strictly in sequence.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-01.briefing: The text is hidden by a style conflict. Determine the final color.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-01.option.BLUE.label: Blue
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-01.option.GREEN.label: Green
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-01.option.RED.label: Red
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-02.briefing: Two classes are arguing. Who is stronger decides the order.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-02.feedback.OK: Correct: equal weight decides the order.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-02.feedback.ORDER_TIE: Weight equal (10 and 10), wins the rule below in the file (order=2).
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-02.option.BLUE.label: Blue
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-02.option.GREEN.label: Green
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-02.option.RED.label: Red
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-03.briefing: It is !important. Don't pretend it doesn't exist.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-03.feedback.IMPORTANT_: !important overrides the normal rule, even if the selector is weaker.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-03.feedback.OK: That's right: importance is stronger than weight.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-03.option.BLUE.label: Blue
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-03.option.GREEN.label: Green
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-03.option.RED.label: Red
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-04.briefing: Inline style on an element. It's not for beauty.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-04.feedback.OK: That's right: inline style is stronger.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-04.option.BLUE.label: Blue
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-04.option.GREEN.label: Green
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-04.option.RED.label: Red
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-05.briefing: The combined selector is stronger than the single class.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-05.option.BLUE.label: Blue
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-05.option.GREEN.label: Green
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-05.option.RED.label: Red
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-06.briefing: Two ID rules with !important. Wins later.
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-06.feedback.ORDER_TIE: Importance and weight are equal, order decides (later = stronger).
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-06.option.BLUE.label: Blue
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-06.option.GREEN.label: Green
case08.fr8c.FR8-C-06.option.RED.label: Red
decryptor.ab.target.title: TARGET
decryptor.ab.hint.unavailable: Diagnostics unavailable. Run a check first.
decryptor.ab.hint.shield_active: Shield is active. Wait for recharge.
decryptor.ab.hint.shield_freq: Frequency shield triggered: too many checks.
decryptor.ab.hint.shield_lazy: Lazy search detected. Change input in larger steps.
decryptor.c.hint.match_targets: Match targets on the left and top.
decryptor.c.hint.limit_reached: Hint limit reached for this stage.
city_map.common.result.err_incomplete: Reach the target node before submit.
city_map.common.result.err_calc: Entered sum does not match selected route.
city_map.common.result.err_not_opt: Route is valid but not optimal.
city_map.common.result.err_path_invalid: Route is invalid for directed edges.
city_map.a.briefing.title: ROUTE AUDIT
city_map.a.briefing.text: Reach node E through directed roads. Enter final path sum and submit. Only the minimal route is accepted.
city_map.a.briefing.footer: Directed graph: only outgoing roads from current node are available.
city_map.b.briefing.title: TRANSIT CHECK
city_map.b.briefing.text: Reach node E, enter exact route sum, and prove optimality in a directed graph.
city_map.b.briefing.footer: Two-way roads are active only where reverse edge exists in data.
city_map.b.result.err_missing_transit: Constraint not met: visit required transit nodes.
city_map.b.result.err_cycle: A cycle has been detected in the route.
city_map.b.status.success: Route accepted. Constraint and optimality are confirmed.
city_map.c.briefing.title: CURFEW WINDOW
city_map.c.briefing.text: Reach node L under dynamic patrol windows. CLOSED edges are blocked; DANGER edges have increased cost.
city_map.c.briefing.footer: Real timer is in the header. Sim-time changes only after successful movement.
city_map.c.result.err_missing_transit: Constraint not met: visit required transit nodes.
city_map.c.result.err_ambush: A blacklist node has been visited.
city_map.c.result.err_calc: Entered sum does not match simulated path cost.
city_map.c.schedule.title: SCHEDULE
city_map.c.status.xor_violation: XOR VIOLATION: at most one node allowed in the group
city_map.c.status.success: Route accepted. Dynamic constraints are respected.
da7.a.ui.inspect_hint: Long-press a row or cell to inspect.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-01.briefing: Find the primary key in the table before linking records.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-01.objective: Click the column header that is the PK.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-01.prompt: Which column is the primary key?
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-01.reveal.correct: PK uniquely identifies each record. Here it is ID.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-01.reveal.CONFUSED_PK_: PK must be unique for every row.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-01.reveal.CONFUSED_ROW: A key is a column, not a row.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-02.briefing: One phone cell contains multiple values.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-02.reveal.correct: Two values in one cell are non-atomic. Split into separate records.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-02.reveal.TYPE_CONFUSI: Single phone value is atomic. Find the comma-separated one.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-03.briefing: Age should be integer, but one value is text.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-03.objective: Click the cell with type mismatch.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-03.prompt: Where is the type violation for Age INT?
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-03.reveal.COUNT_HEADER: Header is not a data cell.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-04.briefing: Find the foreign key that links posts to users.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-04.reveal.correct: FK stores references to another table PK. Here: UserID.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-04.reveal.FK_DIRECTION: PostID is local PK, not FK.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-04.reveal.CONFUSED_ROW: FK is a column, not a row.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-05.briefing: Policy requires Access >= 3. Find violating record.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-05.objective: Click the row that does NOT satisfy Access >= 3.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-05.reveal.MISSED_ROW: Pick the violating row, not a valid one.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-06.briefing: Query by city must use the correct field.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-06.objective: Click the column used for City == Almaty filter.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-06.prompt: Which column should be used for City == Almaty?
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-06.reveal.correct: City filter must use City column.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-06.reveal.MISSED_COLUM: CID is identifier, not city value.
da7.a.case.DA7-A4-06.reveal.CONFUSED_ROW: Filter condition is set on column, not row.
da7.b.ui.rel.drag_hint: Drag cable from PK to FK
da7.b.case.DA7-B2-01.prompt: Redact all rows that do NOT match Access > 3.
da7.b.case.DA7-B2-02.prompt: Redact incidents that do NOT satisfy Sev >= 2.
da7.b.case.DA7-B2-03.prompt: Redact rows that are NOT status ERROR.
da7.b.case.DA7-B2-04.prompt: Redact transactions that do NOT satisfy Amount < 100.
da7.b.case.DA7-B2-R1.prompt: Patch cable: connect PK in Users to FK in Posts.
da7.b.case.DA7-B2-R2.prompt: Patch cable: connect PK in Employees to FK in PassportData.
da7.c.case.DA7-C-01.prompt: Assemble the query that selects user names where id = 5.
da7.c.case.DA7-C-02.prompt: Assemble an UPDATE query: set role='admin' for the user with id = 5.
da7.c.case.DA7-C-03.prompt: Delete DEBUG logs from the Logs table.
da7.c.case.DA7-C-04.prompt: Add user (7, 'Neo') to the Users table.
da7.c.case.DA7-C-05.prompt: Create a table Archive with one column id of type INT.
nt.a.ui.title: NETWORK TRACE | A
nt.a.ui.boot_error: Failed to load Network Trace A levels.
nt.a.ui.status_check_evidence: Check at least {count} clues to unlock trace.
nt.a.ui.status_trace_unlocked: Trace unlocked. Select a device and run trace.
nt.a.ui.status_device_set: Device set. Run trace to check route.
nt.a.ui.status_device_first: Select and install a device first.
nt.a.ui.status_safe_unlocked: Safe mode unlocked. Open diagnostics for details.
nt.a.ui.status_safe_locked: Diagnostics unlocks after two failed traces.
nt.a.ui.status_slot_cleared: Slot cleared. Select another candidate device.
nt.a.ui.status_fallback: Review clue value and layer mapping.

nt.b.ui.boot_error: Failed to load Network Trace B levels.
nt.b.ui.status_assemble: Assemble pipeline and press RUN CALC, then select answer.
nt.b.ui.status_module_selected: Module selected. Place it in the correct slot.
nt.b.ui.status_wrong_slot_type: Wrong module type for this slot.
nt.b.ui.status_slot_cleared: Slot cleared. Rebuild pipeline if needed.
nt.b.ui.status_pipeline_ready: Pipeline core ready. Press RUN CALC.
nt.b.ui.status_calc_done: Calculation done. Select your final answer.
nt.b.ui.status_answer_logic_bad: Answer correct but your pipeline logic is inconsistent.
nt.b.ui.status_safe_unlocked: Safe mode unlocked. Use diagnostics for step-by-step view.
nt.b.ui.status_pipeline_reset: Pipeline reset. Reassemble and run calc.
nt.c.ui.title: NETWORK TRACE | C
nt.c.ui.boot_error: Failed to load Network Trace C levels.
nt.c.ui.status_place_mask: Place mask, apply AND, then select network ID.

nt.c.ui.status_mask_selected: Mask selected. Place it in the target area.
nt.c.ui.status_and_done: AND done. Now select the network ID.
nt.c.ui.status_safe_unlocked: Safe mode unlocked. Open diagnostics for guided review.
nt.c.ui.status_safe_locked: Diagnostics unlocks after first wrong answer.
nt.c.ui.status_board_reset_cidr: Board reset. Mask is CIDR-fixed, press APPLY AND.
nt.c.ui.status_fallback: Review AND result and segment boundaries.
nt.c.ui.log_network_id: Network ID — segment start. A segment is a range of addresses.
nt.c.ui.log_apply_hint: First press APPLY AND, then select the network ID.
nt.a.level.NT_A_01.briefing: Evidence points to failed routing between the office and archive LANs on different subnets.
nt.a.level.NT_A_01.prompt: Examine the clues and identify the device that restores traffic between 192.168.1.0/24 and 10.0.0.0/24.
nt.a.level.NT_A_01.poi.POI_ROUTE.meaning: No L3 forwarding path exists between subnets.
nt.a.level.NT_A_01.poi.POI_ARP.meaning_s: Local L2 is healthy; gateway function is absent.
nt.a.level.NT_A_01.poi.POI_ICMP.meaning_: Host is only reachable when routing is present.
nt.a.level.NT_A_01.option.router.label: Router
nt.a.level.NT_A_01.option.switch.label: Switch
nt.a.level.NT_A_01.option.hub.label: Hub
nt.a.level.NT_A_01.option.repeater.label: Repeater
nt.a.level.NT_A_01.option.bridge.label: Bridge
nt.a.level.NT_A_01.option.patch.label: Patch Panel
nt.a.level.NT_A_01.explain_short: A router is required to forward packets between subnets.
nt.a.level.NT_A_02.briefing: Collision spikes and broadcast flooding indicate one oversized collision domain.
nt.a.level.NT_A_02.prompt: Select the device that segments the LAN and reduces collision pressure.
nt.a.level.NT_A_02.poi.POI_COLL.meaning_: Shared medium saturation indicates an L1/L2 bottleneck.
nt.a.level.NT_A_02.poi.POI_DROP.log_line: Packet loss occurs during office peak load
nt.a.level.NT_A_02.option.router.label: Router
nt.a.level.NT_A_02.option.switch.label: Switch
nt.a.level.NT_A_02.option.hub.label: Hub
nt.a.level.NT_A_02.option.repeater.label: Repeater
nt.a.level.NT_A_02.option.bridge.label: Bridge
nt.a.level.NT_A_02.option.patch.label: Patch Panel
nt.a.level.NT_A_02.explain_short: A switch isolates collision domains and forwards via MAC table.
nt.a.level.NT_A_03.briefing: Unknown unicast flooding occurs during printer traffic bursts.
nt.a.level.NT_A_03.prompt: Install the device that stops frame flooding while keeping the same subnet.
nt.a.level.NT_A_03.poi.POI_UNI.meaning_s: Frames are flooded due to MAC learning miss.
nt.a.level.NT_A_03.poi.POI_QUEUE.log_lin: Queue bursts in shared segment during print jobs
nt.a.level.NT_A_03.poi.POI_QUEUE.meaning: Traffic contention grows in non-switched segments.
nt.a.level.NT_A_03.poi.POI_MIRROR.log_li: Hosts receive frames not addressed to them.
nt.a.level.NT_A_03.option.router.label: Router
nt.a.level.NT_A_03.option.switch.label: Switch
nt.a.level.NT_A_03.option.hub.label: Hub
nt.a.level.NT_A_03.option.repeater.label: Repeater
nt.a.level.NT_A_03.option.bridge.label: Bridge
nt.a.level.NT_A_03.option.patch.label: Patch Panel
nt.a.level.NT_A_03.explain_short: A switch learns MAC addresses and limits flooding.
nt.a.level.NT_A_04.briefing: CRC errors and link flapping vary with load on a long cable run.
nt.a.level.NT_A_04.prompt: Select the device that restores physical signal integrity on this segment.
nt.a.level.NT_A_04.poi.POI_CRC.log_line: CRC errors arising along cable run
nt.a.level.NT_A_04.poi.POI_CRC.meaning_s: Signal corruption happens before higher-level logic.
nt.a.level.NT_A_04.poi.POI_IP_OK.meaning: Problem is below the L3 layer.
nt.a.level.NT_A_04.option.router.label: Router
nt.a.level.NT_A_04.option.switch.label: Switch
nt.a.level.NT_A_04.option.hub.label: Hub
nt.a.level.NT_A_04.option.repeater.label: Repeater
nt.a.level.NT_A_04.option.bridge.label: Bridge
nt.a.level.NT_A_04.option.patch.label: Patch Panel
nt.a.level.NT_A_04.explain_short: A repeater regenerates the degraded electrical signal at Layer 1.
nt.a.level.NT_A_05.briefing: Local pings work, but external addresses remain unreachable.
nt.a.level.NT_A_05.prompt: Select the device that provides default-gateway routing to the external network.
nt.a.level.NT_A_05.poi.POI_GW.meaning_sh: No path from LAN to external networks.
nt.a.level.NT_A_05.poi.POI_LOCAL.meaning: Internal switching works; external route is absent.
nt.a.level.NT_A_05.poi.POI_EXT.meaning_s: Gateway routing beyond local subnet is required.
nt.a.level.NT_A_05.option.router.label: Router
nt.a.level.NT_A_05.option.switch.label: Switch
nt.a.level.NT_A_05.option.hub.label: Hub
nt.a.level.NT_A_05.option.repeater.label: Repeater
nt.a.level.NT_A_05.option.bridge.label: Bridge
nt.a.level.NT_A_05.option.patch.label: Patch Panel
nt.a.level.NT_A_05.explain_short: A router provides the default gateway and route selection.
nt.a.level.NT_A_06.briefing: Two VLANs need to exchange traffic; they are isolated from each other.
nt.a.level.NT_A_06.prompt: Install the correct device to enable inter-VLAN communication.
nt.a.level.NT_A_06.poi.POI_VL20.log_line: VLAN20 hosts see only internal data
nt.a.level.NT_A_06.poi.POI_VL20.meaning_: Problem occurs only at inter-VLAN boundaries.
nt.a.level.NT_A_06.poi.POI_INTER.meaning: A Layer 3 gateway is required between VLANs.
nt.a.level.NT_A_06.option.router.label: Router
nt.a.level.NT_A_06.option.switch.label: Switch
nt.a.level.NT_A_06.option.hub.label: Hub
nt.a.level.NT_A_06.option.repeater.label: Repeater
nt.a.level.NT_A_06.option.bridge.label: Bridge
nt.a.level.NT_A_06.option.patch.label: Patch Panel
nt.a.level.NT_A_07.briefing: The annex office link is too weak over distance and drops under peak load.
nt.a.level.NT_A_07.prompt: Select the device that restores the long physical segment.
nt.a.level.NT_A_07.poi.POI_RETRY.log_lin: Frequent frame retransmissions from the annex
nt.a.level.NT_A_07.poi.POI_CFG.meaning_s: Configuration is not the root cause.
nt.a.level.NT_A_07.option.router.label: Router
nt.a.level.NT_A_07.option.switch.label: Switch
nt.a.level.NT_A_07.option.hub.label: Hub
nt.a.level.NT_A_07.option.repeater.label: Repeater
nt.a.level.NT_A_07.option.bridge.label: Bridge
nt.a.level.NT_A_07.option.patch.label: Patch Panel
nt.a.level.NT_A_07.explain_short: A repeater restores signal over long cable runs.
nt.a.level.NT_A_08.briefing: Heavy contention occurs in the meeting-room floor segment during conferences.
nt.a.level.NT_A_08.prompt: Select the device that isolates endpoints and reduces collision pressure.
nt.a.level.NT_A_08.poi.POI_STORM.meaning: Broadcasts must be contained by MAC-based forwarding.
nt.a.level.NT_A_08.poi.POI_COLL2.meaning: Shared medium behaviour indicates non-switched segment.
nt.a.level.NT_A_08.poi.POI_LAT.log_line: Latency spikes only within floor segment
nt.a.level.NT_A_08.option.router.label: Router
nt.a.level.NT_A_08.option.switch.label: Switch
nt.a.level.NT_A_08.option.hub.label: Hub
nt.a.level.NT_A_08.option.repeater.label: Repeater
nt.a.level.NT_A_08.option.bridge.label: Bridge
nt.a.level.NT_A_08.option.patch.label: Patch Panel
nt.a.level.NT_A_08.explain_short: A switch provides dedicated collision domains per port.
nt.a.level.NT_A_09.briefing: The archive subnet cannot reach the update mirror in a different subnet.
nt.a.level.NT_A_09.prompt: Install the correct forwarding device to cross the subnet boundary.
nt.a.level.NT_A_09.poi.POI_SUBNET_A.mean: Local L2 domain works on the source side.
nt.a.level.NT_A_09.poi.POI_SUBNET_B.mean: Destination subnet is alive but isolated.
nt.a.level.NT_A_09.poi.POI_GW2.log_line: No route entry between the /24 networks
nt.a.level.NT_A_09.option.router.label: Router
nt.a.level.NT_A_09.option.switch.label: Switch
nt.a.level.NT_A_09.option.hub.label: Hub
nt.a.level.NT_A_09.option.repeater.label: Repeater
nt.a.level.NT_A_09.option.bridge.label: Bridge
nt.a.level.NT_A_09.option.patch.label: Patch Panel
nt.a.level.NT_A_09.explain_short: A router is required to forward between different /24 ranges.
nt.a.level.NT_A_10.briefing: The legacy lab segment reports frame flooding and duplicate traffic.
nt.a.level.NT_A_10.prompt: Select the device that stabilises this lab segment without changing the subnet plan.
nt.a.level.NT_A_10.poi.POI_DUP.log_line: Duplicate frames observed on multiple hosts
nt.a.level.NT_A_10.poi.POI_BC2.log_line: Broadcast counters rising during file copy
nt.a.level.NT_A_10.poi.POI_BC2.meaning_s: Broadcast containment required at access boundary.
nt.a.level.NT_A_10.poi.POI_RT_OK.meaning: Problem is not in routing policy.
nt.a.level.NT_A_10.option.router.label: Router
nt.a.level.NT_A_10.option.switch.label: Switch
nt.a.level.NT_A_10.option.hub.label: Hub
nt.a.level.NT_A_10.option.repeater.label: Repeater
nt.a.level.NT_A_10.option.bridge.label: Bridge
nt.a.level.NT_A_10.option.patch.label: Patch Panel
nt.a.level.NT_A_10.explain_short: Switching addresses per-port frame forwarding within one subnet.

nt.c.level.NT_C_01.briefing: Exam mode: calculate the network ID from IP and CIDR using the AND operation.
nt.c.level.NT_C_01.prompt: IP 192.168.1.142, /26. Apply AND and select the network ID (last octet).
nt.c.level.NT_C_01.explain_short: /26 gives step 64. 142 belongs to 128..191, so network ID = 128.
nt.c.level.NT_C_02.briefing: Exam mode: calculate the network ID from IP and CIDR using the AND operation.
nt.c.level.NT_C_02.prompt: IP 10.0.5.77, /27. Apply AND and select the network ID (last octet).
nt.c.level.NT_C_02.explain_short: /27 gives step 32. 77 belongs to 64..95, so network ID = 64.
nt.c.level.NT_C_03.briefing: Exam mode: calculate the network ID from IP and CIDR using the AND operation.
nt.c.level.NT_C_03.prompt: IP 172.16.9.200, /28. Apply AND and select the network ID (last octet).
nt.c.level.NT_C_03.explain_short: /28 gives step 16. 200 belongs to 192..207, so network ID = 192.
nt.c.level.NT_C_04.briefing: Training mode: distributed mask exercise — apply AND and find the segment start.
nt.c.level.NT_C_04.prompt: IP 192.168.1.13, /25. Apply AND and select the network ID (last octet).
nt.c.level.NT_C_04.explain_short: /25 gives step 128. 13 belongs to 0..127, so network ID = 0.
nt.c.level.NT_C_05.briefing: Training mode: distributed mask exercise — apply AND and find the segment start.
nt.c.level.NT_C_05.prompt: IP 192.168.1.220, /26. Apply AND and select the network ID (last octet).
nt.c.level.NT_C_05.explain_short: /26 gives step 64. 220 belongs to 192..255, so network ID = 192.
nt.c.level.NT_C_06.briefing: Exam mode: calculate the network ID from IP and CIDR using the AND operation.
nt.c.level.NT_C_06.prompt: IP 192.168.1.63, /26. Apply AND and select the network ID (last octet).
nt.c.level.NT_C_06.explain_short: /26 gives step 64. 63 belongs to 0..63, so network ID = 0.
nt.c.level.NT_C_07.briefing: Exam mode: calculate the network ID from IP and CIDR using the AND operation.
nt.c.level.NT_C_07.prompt: IP 10.40.12.158, /27. Apply AND and select the network ID (last octet).
nt.c.level.NT_C_07.explain_short: /27 gives step 32. 158 belongs to 128..159, so network ID = 128.
nt.c.level.NT_C_08.briefing: Exam mode: calculate the network ID from IP and CIDR using the AND operation.
nt.c.level.NT_C_08.prompt: IP 172.20.8.19, /28. Apply AND and select the network ID (last octet).
nt.c.level.NT_C_08.explain_short: /28 gives step 16. 19 belongs to 16..31, so network ID = 16.
nt.c.level.NT_C_09.briefing: Training mode: distributed mask exercise — apply AND and find the segment start.
nt.c.level.NT_C_09.prompt: IP 192.168.50.94, /27. Apply AND and select the network ID (last octet).
nt.c.level.NT_C_09.explain_short: /27 gives step 32. 94 belongs to 64..95, so network ID = 64.
nt.c.level.NT_C_10.briefing: Exam mode: calculate the network ID from IP and CIDR using the AND operation.
nt.c.level.NT_C_10.prompt: IP 10.1.3.245, /28. Apply AND and select the network ID (last octet).
nt.c.level.NT_C_10.explain_short: /28 gives step 16. 245 belongs to 240..255, so network ID = 240.
suspect.a.status.boot_error: Failed to load suspect quest levels.
suspect.a.status.ready: Calculate the final s and enter your answer.
suspect.a.status.error_limit: Error limit reached. Safe mode enabled.
suspect.a.labels.goal: Goal: find the final value of s
suspect.a.level.A-17.briefing: Compound OR branch on explicit list.
suspect.a.level.A-02.explain.0: Only values divisible by 3 are added.
suspect.a.level.A-03.explain.0: List order is fixed and explicit.
suspect.a.level.A-04.explain.0: while checks boundary before every step.
suspect.a.level.A-11.explain.0: break stops execution of remaining iterations.
suspect.a.level.A-12.explain.0: continue skips the rest of current loop body.
suspect.a.level.A-16.explain.1: Multiply each value by 2 before summing.
suspect.a.level.A-17.explain.0: Both sides of the AND must be true.
suspect.a.level.A-18.explain.0: OR is true for i=1 and i=4 only.
suspect.a.level.A-18.explain.1: All other iterations use the else branch.
restore.b.level.B-01.distractor.2.hint: Step too small: more numbers were added.
restore.b.level.B-01.distractor.9.hint: Step too large: the loop barely ran.
restore.b.level.B-03.explain.2: Correct block is >= 3 to reach s=2.
restore.b.level.B-07.explain.3: Correct block is 2 for target result.
restore.b.level.B-17.explain.7: Note: target is 4, block 5 is correct.
restore.b.level.B-18.explain.0: When i reaches 2, s resets to 0
disarm.c.labels.title: DISARM C
disarm.c.status.main_hint: Expected s in window (X). Got in buggy system (Y). Fix code so Y = X.
disarm.c.status.correct: Fix confirmed: actual value matches expected.
disarm.c.status.wrong_patch: Correct line, wrong patch. Try another option.
disarm.c.status.wrong_line: Bug not in that line. Find the line that changes s.
disarm.c.diag.title: Disarm C analysis: {id}
disarm.c.level.C-05.explain.0: Current code adds only one value (2).
disarm.c.level.C-06.explain.0: OR is too broad for this filter.
disarm.c.level.C-07.explain.0: Current range includes one extra value.
disarm.c.level.C-08.explain.0: Positive step when start > stop yields nothing.
disarm.c.level.C-08.explain.1: A negative step is needed for countdown.
disarm.c.level.C-10.explain.1: The accumulator's initial value must be zero.
disarm.c.level.C-11.explain.0: Subtraction inverts the sign of the result.
disarm.c.level.C-12.explain.1: The expected value requires even numbers.
disarm.c.level.C-13.explain.1: An inclusive upper bound is needed.
disarm.c.level.C-14.explain.1: Direct accumulation of i is needed.
disarm.c.level.C-15.explain.0: Subtracting 1 from each term underestimates the sum.
disarm.c.level.C-15.explain.1: Use the raw i values for accumulation.
disarm.c.level.C-16.explain.0: continue excludes i = 6 from the sum.
disarm.c.level.C-16.explain.1: No flow control needed in this branch.
disarm.c.level.C-17.explain.0: Current code overwrites s on every iteration.
disarm.c.level.C-18.explain.0: OR captures too many extra values.
disarm.c.level.C-18.explain.1: AND keeps only numbers divisible by both 2 and 3.
logic.a.ui.title: LIE DETECTOR A-01
logic.a.ui.target_default: GOAL: gather facts and give a verdict
logic.a.ui.step2: 2) Press PROBE to record a fact.
logic.a.ui.step3: 3) Pick a gate in the inventory.
logic.a.case.A1_01.w: Engine starts only if KEY is present and START is pressed.
logic.a.case.A1_02.w: You get wet if there is RAIN or SNOW.
logic.a.case.A1_03.w: Lie detector inverts: input 0 -> output 1, input 1 -> output 0.
quest.radio.a.task: Signal detected. Alphabet size: %d chars. Set decoding depth.
quest.radio.b.task: Message length: %d chars. Calculate size (I=K*i) and select drive.
quest.radio.c.risk_fail_time: DECISION ERROR! Calc: {calc}s. Intercept in: {limit}s. Not enough time!
quest.radio.c.risk_fail_math: MATH ERROR! MB to Mbps conversion or division mistake.
quest.radio.c.abort_success: STATUS: SUCCESS. Good risk assessment, transfer was impossible.
quest.radio.a.ui.title: RADIO INTERCEPT | A
quest.radio.a.ui.knob_hint: Rotate the knob, then press ANALYZE
quest.radio.a.details.rule: Rule: find minimum i where 2^i >= N.
quest.radio.a.details.step2: 2) Press ANALYZE and wait for scan.
quest.radio.a.details.analyzing: Channel analysis in progress. Please wait.
quest.radio.a.details.analysis_done: Analysis complete. Changing i requires a new scan.
quest.radio.a.status.plan: STATUS: set i, then press ANALYZE.
quest.radio.a.status.hint: STATUS: use rule 2^i >= N and choose minimal i.
quest.radio.a.status.analyze_underfit: STATUS: not enough capacity. Increase i.
quest.radio.a.status.analyze_overkill: STATUS: fits, but with bit overhead.
quest.radio.a.result.bad: STATUS: incorrect. Packet did not fit.
quest.radio.b.ui.title: RADIO INTERCEPT | B
quest.radio.b.details.input: Enter I in required units and choose storage.
quest.radio.b.details.bytes_note: If answer is in bytes, divide by 8.
quest.radio.b.details.outcome_best: Outcome: BEST FIT. Minimal storage that fits packet.
quest.radio.b.details.outcome_under: Outcome: UNDERFIT. Selected storage is too small.
quest.radio.b.details.outcome_unit: Outcome: UNIT CONFUSION. Value entered in wrong units.
quest.radio.b.details.outcome_calc: Outcome: CALC WRONG. Error in I calculation.
quest.radio.b.details.outcome_over: Outcome: OVERKILL. Storage fits but has unnecessary overhead.
quest.radio.b.status.converter: STATUS: hint: I = K * i; for bytes divide by 8.
quest.radio.b.status.plan: STATUS: enter I and press ENTER.
quest.radio.b.result.under: STATUS: incorrect. Storage does not fit data.
quest.radio.b.result.calc: STATUS: storage picked, but I calculation is wrong.
quest.radio.b.result.over: STATUS: valid but storage is overkill.
quest.radio.c.ui.title: RADIO INTERCEPT | C
quest.radio.c.ui.hint: First estimate t. Then ANALYZE. Then decide.
quest.radio.c.details.after_finish: Error analysis appears here after result.
quest.radio.c.error.forgot_x8: Forgot x8 when converting MB to Mbit.
quest.radio.c.error.forgot_x1024: Forgot x1024 when converting GB to MB.
quest.radio.c.status.plan: STATUS: set forecast and press ANALYZE.
quest.radio.c.status.units_hint: STATUS: MB -> Mbit: x8, GB -> MB: x1024, t = I / v.
quest.radio.c.result.success: STATUS: SUCCESS. Packet sent before interception.
quest.radio.c.result.missed: STATUS: MISSED. You could have made it.
resus.title: Case 01: Digital Resuscitation

resus.a.level.RESUS-A-01.briefing: Restore the forensic workstation by connecting each part to the correct connector groups.
resus.a.level.RESUS-A-02.briefing: Trap level: identify fake peripherals and connect only valid workstation parts.
resus.a.level.RESUS-A-03.briefing: Advanced stage: rebuild the workstation with an alternative output topology within diagnostics.

resus.b.level.CASE01_B_01.context: Render recovery profile: configure CPU/RAM/GPU and pass the benchmark within budget.
resus.b.level.CASE01_B_02.context: Emergency compile profile: maintain stable latency under multitasking and stay within budget.
resus.b.level.CASE01_B_03.context: Virtualisation profile: maintain stable VM density without exceeding the spending policy.

resus.c.level.CASE01_C_01.prompt: Install exactly three network modules to secure the archive link.

resus.c.level.CASE01_C_03.prompt: Filtering profile: prioritise packet inspection and low intercept surface.
